title: Add Google Search Console verification meta tag

requirements.text: Add the Google Search Console verification meta tag `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="nXnhEpzvMaE0Ar1cmkZOveExIIRtVI6zDDa6IgOXmu0" />` inside the `<head>` element of `frontend/index.html`.
acceptanceCriteria: The meta tag `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="nXnhEpzvMaE0Ar1cmkZOveExIIRtVI6zDDa6IgOXmu0" />` is present in the `<head>` section of `frontend/index.html`.
No existing meta tags or SEO elements in `frontend/index.html` are removed or altered.
Google Search Console can successfully verify ownership of the site using this tag.

constraints: Do not remove or modify any existing meta tags, structured data, or SEO elements in frontend/index.html.
The verification tag must use the exact content value: nXnhEpzvMaE0Ar1cmkZOveExIIRtVI6zDDa6IgOXmu0
